scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev -w web" "npm run start:dev -w api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w api
scripts.start: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run start -w web" "npm run start:prod -w api"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w web && npm run lint -w api
scripts.format: npm run format -w web && npm run format -w api
